implemented_changes.change: Protected each PS2 frame transfer with a short IRQ-masked critical section so host UART interrupts cannot corrupt bit-bang timing mid-frame.
Reduced MPU6050 I2C transaction timeout from 100 ms to 10 ms for register and bulk reads.
Reduced SSD1306 I2C command/data transaction timeouts from 100 ms to 5 ms / 20 ms.

root_cause_summary: PS2 is implemented by GPIO bit-bang timing and was vulnerable to asynchronous USART3 interrupt preemption during host traffic.
MPU6050 and OLED share I2C1 with long blocking HAL timeouts; repeated stalls could significantly starve the main loop and contribute to apparent reset behavior via watchdog expiration.

verification.build_blocker: cmake executable not available in current environment
